arts.ttl: Manchester United only club to make ‘formal offer’ for player – Player pushing for transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United are the only side to have made a ‘formal offer’ for Patrick Dorgu at this moment in time but could be behind Napoli. That’s according to Tuttomercatoweb, who report that Napoli’s willingness to sanction a loan deal means they have an advantage. arts.ttl: Harry Maguire sends demand to Man Utd team-mates after Ruben Amorim's brutal blast
arts.sum: Harry Maguire is calling on Manchester United's players to stand up and be counted before Europa League clash against Rangers and weekend Premier League trip to Fulham

arts.ttl: Man United offered 'discount' to sign prolific Napoli striker as part of Alejandro Garnacho deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly given the chance to sign a prolific striker for a cut-price fee as part of a deal which would see Alejandro Garnacho join Napoli.

arts.ttl: Man United 'put together four-man striker shortlist' as Red Devils 'look to boost attack' before January transfer window closes
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly place Ipswich Town's Liam Delap, Brentford's Bryan Mbeumo, Wolverhampton Wanderers' Matheus Cunha and Lille's Jonathan David on their four-man striker shortlist.
